The balance should be invoked with the following hymns :
"As the Goddess of Speech is verily Truth, you will, O Trutl) incar-
nate, show the real truth, since you are dedicated to Truth. May
that Truth appear here, the Truth by which the Sun and the Moon,
the planets and the hosts of stars rise in the east and set in the west,
the Truth which is revealed in all the Vedas, in the Sages rooted in
spirituality and in the three worlds. You are the daughter of
Brahman (creator), called by the name Aditya (daughter of Aditi),
and descended from the spiritual preceptor, Sage Kasyapa. You are
popularly known as Balance."
